title: fagraea berteroana var. pogas
intro: Fagraea berteroana var. pogas, also known as the Pogas Fagraea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is a type of tropical shrub native to the islands of Hawaii, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, headache, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Fagraea berteroana var. pogas can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide relief from colds, sore throats, and respiratory problems.
